rulings.Case Title: SUERTE HOLDINGS, LLC VS. LUKE BRUNGARA ET AL

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Stewart Title Of California, Inc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 03, 2016, line 4. Defendant Stewart Title Of California, Inc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication DENIED. Moving party shifted its burden and the opposing party created a triable issue of fact. Summary adjudication is GRANTED as to the sixth and eighth cause of action only because Plaintiff concedes the causes of actions appear not to involve the Defendant.= (501/REQ)
